a:r.a:t: Approve the bounded next increment that proves the open AVEVA control plane in a real shipbuilding change scenario
Phase 2 configuration core + bounded Continuous Naval Assurance pilot
Open AVEVA control plane above specialist tools
26-week WBS, KPI gates, customer + class release
PROOF AT G6: ONE CLOSED, AUDITABLE LOOP
Success means the customer can see, explain, approve and replay every state transition - without replacing certified specialist solvers.
WHY NOW | The executable reference is ready; the next differentiator is controlled configuration + cross-domain evidence + lifecycle learning.
